chapter_title.en: Chapter 56 – The supplication for the illnesses and diseases

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/434)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/434)
text: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) كَانَ يُنَشِّرُ بِهَذَا الدُّعَاءِ تَضَعُ يَدَكَ عَلَى مَوْضِعِ الْوَجَعِ وَ تَقُولُ

أَيُّهَا الْوَجَعُ اسْكُنْ بِسَكِينَةِ اللَّهِ وَ قِرْ بِوَقَارِ اللَّهِ وَ انْحَجِزْ بِحَاجِزِ اللَّهِ وَ اهْدَأْ بِهَدْءِ اللَّهِ أُعِيذُكَ أَيُّهَا الْإِنْسَانُ بِمَا أَعَاذَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ بِهِ عَرْشَهُ وَ مَلَائِكَتَهُ يَوْمَ الرَّجْفَةِ وَ الزَّلَازِلِ تَقُولُ ذَلِكَ سَبْعَ مَرَّاتٍ وَ لَا أَقَلَّ مِنَ الثَّلَاثِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Haroun Bin Muslim, from Mas’ada Bin Sadaqa,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> that the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> used to seek cure with this supplication: ‘You should place your hand upon the place of the pain, and you should be saying,

‘O you pain! Settle by the Tranquility of Allahazwj, and cool down by the Dignity of Allahazwj, and be barred by the Barrier of Allahazwj, calm down by the Calmness of Allahazwj. Seek Refuge, O human being, by what Refuge of Allahazwj with Allahazwj would be sought by Hisazwj Throne, and Hisazwj Angels on the Day of tremors and earthquakes’. You should say that seven times, and not less than three’.
en.sarwar: 17. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Harun ibn Muslim from Mas’adah ibn Sadaqa from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “The Holy Prophet would seek cure with this supplication. He would place his hand over the painful area and say, ‘O pain, calm down by the serenity of Allah, silence by the dignity of Allah, be barred by the barrier of Allah, quiet down by the calm of Allah, I protect you O human being by that with which Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, has protected His Throne, His angels on the day of the shaking and quake.’ You should say it seven times or no less than three times.”
